text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I spot Mayano Top Gun and Oguri Cap
out on the track.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Huff... Pant... Phew.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: That was a great run, Oguri! Here, have this! ♪

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: A yakisoba dog? Why are you giving me this?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's a little "just-because" present! From me to
you!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Make sure you take a break after you eat it. Do
you copy?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Grrrowl...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Oh... That was my stomach.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
You're amazing, Mayano. Thanks for this! I'll have
it right now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't help feeling puzzled by their odd
conversation. While I wonder about it, my gaze
wanders toward Mayano Top Gun.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hm? Is there something you wanna ask?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you mean from earlier? Well, Oguri looked
upset just now, right?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I figured something was up with her, but I didn't
know what exactly...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
So I asked around, and that's how I got to the
bottom of it!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Aw, that makes sense... I get anxious when my
times don't improve too.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Well, we all have days where we really want to try
harder. So I figured it might be nice to look after
her and make sure she doesn't overdo it.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to make her feel better, so I did what my
dad used to do for me!
choice_data_list: That's why you got her a gift?
That's why you got her a gift?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Yep! No matter how busy my dad was, he could
always tell when I was sad.

text_block_list.name: Mayano's Father
text_block_list.text:
Go ahead and open it. You're always working so
hard, my dear little Maya.

text_block_list.name: Mayano's Father
text_block_list.text: That's what I call a "just-because" present.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
He didn't get me anything special or whatever. It
was usually just snacks or stationery.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
But knowing my dad was always thinking of me
made me forget all about my worries!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
So that's what inspired me to get something to
cheer Oguri up!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Besides, doesn't getting someone a present for no
particular reason kinda feel like a grown-up thing
to do?
choice_data_list: Your father is a wonderful man.
Your father is a wonderful man.
It really is mature to be considerate of others.
It really is mature to be considerate of others.
Maybe I should give something too.
Maybe I should give something too.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Besides, doesn't getting someone a present for no
particular reason kinda feel like a grown-up thing
to do?
choice_data_list: Your father is a wonderful man.
Your father is a wonderful man.
It really is mature to be considerate of others.
It really is mature to be considerate of others.
Maybe I should give something too.
Maybe I should give something too.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I know! Isn't he?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I talk to my dad a lot on LANE, and he even sends
me little "just-because" presents on there too.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Here... Check these out!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
This one's a fancy cafe he saw after landing! And
this is a pretty view, and here's a cute kitty pic he
sent me!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
But you know, it's not the gifts that make me
happy, it's knowing he's thinking of me! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The grace with which she receives other people's
kindness leaves quite an impression on me.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I wonder where we should go the next time I get
to see him. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Sometimes when he doesn't have any flights
scheduled, we go out on father-daughter dates!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: We'll go out shopping or visit cafes... Oh, I know!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Do you think you could recommend somewhere
awesome for me and my dad to go? ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
How about a place that's mature and exciting,
but also cute? And a little thrilling too!
choice_data_list: Those criteria are all over the place!
Those criteria are all over the place!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I anguish over Mayano Top Gun's long list of
conflicting demands.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Aren't I? I'm practically an adult lady
already! ♪

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Oh, there she is! ☆ Hey there, Maya! ★

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ooh, it's Marvey! Hi hi!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
We're about to head out to a cafe! ☆ The
rainbow pudding with whipped cream there is
bound to be marvelous! ★

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Is that a new dessert? You're not a real
adult unless you keep up with the trends! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Watching Mayano Top Gun dash off, I glimpse a
picture-perfect example of youth in full bloom.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suddenly remember what I'm carrying in my
pocket and tell her that I have something for her.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Huh? But why? I haven't even done anything.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! Are you copying me? ♪ Yay! I wonder
what it is?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ooh, a lollipop! I love these! Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! I'm so happy! ♪
